rationale: Self-IDs 'ein unabhaengiges, partnergefuehrtes Multi-Family Office' in Zurich; Altss/Simple/Pitchbook corroborate MFO; FINMA-licensed, founded 1998. 65/12.
Brands 'outsourced family office' but SEC shows Greenwood Village RIA, $296M, 147 individual clients on AUM fees - client-serving advisory with an FO service line, not one family's capital.
